t_score.label: Theoretical Soundness
t_score.description: Was it rigorous for its era? Does it hold logically?

d_score.label: Temporal Drift
d_score.description: How dated is it? What's been superseded? What holds?

g_score.label: Data Groundability
g_score.description: Can modern methods validate/falsify it? Empirically testable?

a_score.label: Advancement Potential
a_score.description: Can we synthesize new knowledge into a better version?

m_score.label: Market Value
m_score.description: Who needs this NOW? Academic/Industry/Creator demand?

s_score.label: Content Saturation
s_score.description: How flooded is the market? Unique angle or retreading?
